TPC: 80.8 MT/CM (@ 14.9 M)
DEADWEIGHT/DRAFT:
SUMMER: 93237.7 MT/14.900M
SUMMER FRESH WATER: 93240.4 MT/15.236M
WINTER: 90733.4 MT/14.590M
TROPICAL: 95747.4 MT/15.210M
TROPICAL FRESH WATER: 95694.1 MT/15.546M
HOLD / HATCH: 7/7
GRAIN CUBIC: 110330.09 CUBM/BALE CAPACITY: 88903.74 CUBM
ECO SPEED/CONSUMPTION:
BALLAST:  ABT 12.5 KNOTS HSFO 25.0 MT/DAY+LSMGO 0.05MT/DAY
LADEN:  ABT 11.5 KNOTS HSFO 26.0 MT/DAY+LSMGO0.05MT/DAY
VESSEL BURNS MGO WHEN NAVIGATING IN NARROW AND SHALLOW WATERS, TRANSITING AND SAILING IN/OUT PORTS.
ADDITIONALLY, ABT 6.0MT IFO FOR EACH BALLAST EXCHANGE OPERATION AT SEA. IN CASE VERY WARM OR VERY COLD
WEATHER WHEN HEATING/COOLING IS REQUIRED ABT 1 MT IFO DAY.
IN PORT IDLE: ABT HSFO 2.5 MT/DAY + ABT LSMGO 0.05 MT/DAY
IN PORT WORKING: ABT HSFO 3.5MT/DAY MT + ABT LSMGO 0.05 MT/DAY
FUEL OIL SPEC: RMG 380 CST ISO 8217:2017 OR IF NOT AVAILABLE 8217:2010 IS ALLOWED AND CHRTRS TO PROVIDE
EVIDENCE THAT 8217:2017 NOT AVAILABLE.
LSMGO SPEC: DMZ ISO 8217:2017 OR IF NOT AVAILABLE 8217:2010 IS ALLOWED AND CHRTRS TO PROVIDE EVIDENCE
THAT 8217:2017 NOT AVAILABLE.
DEFINITION OF GOOD WEATHER AND SMOOTH SEA AS FOLLOWS:
FORCE WIND MAX. BEAUFORT SCALE 4 AND/OR TOTAL SEA STATE WHICH IS COMBINED
SEA HEIGHT (WIND DRIVEN SEA WAVES AND SWELL) UP TO SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT
OF 1.25 MTRS AND / OR NO ADVERSE CURRENTS AS ALL OF THEM RECORDED IN THE LOG
BOOK. VESSEL TO BE EVEN KEEL, IN DEEP AND CURRENTLESS WATERS.SPEED IS NOT TO
BE DEBITED DUE TO FAVORABLE CURRENTS, AND A CURRENT FACTOR IS NOT TO BE APPLIED
TO INCREASE THE WARRANTED SPEED ON STEAMING DAYS DURING WHICH THE VESSEL
EXPERIENCED FAVORABLE CURRENT.NO WARRANTY APPLIES ON WEATHER CONDITIONS
EXCEEDING WIND BEAUFORT 4 AND/OR TOTAL SEA STATE WHICH IS COMBINED SEA HEIGHT
(WIND DRIVEN SEA WAVES AND SWELL) UP TO SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT OF 1.25 MTRS
AND/OR ADVERSE CURRENTS DURING WHICH PERFORMANCE EVALUATION IS NOT ALLOWED.
NO EXTRAPOLATIONS / ASSUMPTIONS TO BE MADE FOR WEATHER / SEA CONDITIONS OTHER
THAN THOSE DESCRIBED ABOVE
WHEN EVALUATING VESSEL\'S PERFORMANCE, GOOD WEATHER PERIOD TO BE 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS, ALL DAYS
WHERE WEATHER EXCEED BEAUFORT 4 (MAX 16KNOTS) AND/OR DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 AND ADVERSE CURRENT
ARE EXPRESSLY EXCLUDED. FAVORABLE CURRENTS ARE NOT TO BE TAKEN INTO ACCOUNT, EXCLUDES CANALS,
NARROW/ POOR VISIBILITY/ HEAVY TRAFFIC/TIDAL AFFECTED WATERS OR WHEN SAILING IN PIRACY HRA.
VESSEL TO HAVE LIBERTY OF USING MDO OR MGO WHEN START/STOP/SWITCH GENERATOR ENGINE, AND WHEN
ENTERING/LEAVING PORT, MANEUVERING IN SHALLOW, NARROW OR RESTRICTED WATERS, ALSO CANALS/RIVERS
/DURING PILOTAGE/FOG ETC, UNDER DISCRETION OF THE MASTER.
VESSEL IS ALLOWED TO CONSUME EXTRA BUNKER WHEN CLEANING HOLDS /EXCHANGE BALLASTING WATER.
EXTRA IFO OR MDO/MGO CONSUMED AND EXTRA TIME INCURRED FOR BALLAST WATER EXCHANGE OPERATION
AS BEING DEEMED NECESSARY/REASONABLE BY THE MASTER, TO BE FOR CHARTERERS\' ACCOUNT.
CHARTERERS WARRANT TO SUPPLY BUNKERS TO VESSEL DURING THE CURRENCY OF THIS CHARTER WITH
SPECIFICATIONS NOT LOWER THAN IFO: 380 CST RMG 35 STANDARD AS PER ISO 8217:2010 OR LATEST EDITION
/ LSMGO: DMA STANDARD AS PER ISO 8217:2010 OR LATEST EDITION WITH LESS THAN 0.1% SULPHUR, AND ALSO
TO COMPLY WITH THE LATEST MARPOL 73/78 ALL AND RELEVANT INTERNATIONAL AND LOCAL REGULATIONS AND
ANY SUBSEQUENT AMENDMENTS.
THE WORD "ABT" (ABOUT) IN SPEED AND CONSUMPTION REFERS TO AN ALLOWANCE OF MINUS (- ) 0.5 KNOTS IN
SPEED AND PLUS (+) 5% ON BUNKER CONSUMPTION RESPECTIVELY
CHARTERERS TO COMPLY WITH FUEL SULPHUR CONTENT AS PER THE REQUIREMENTS OF MARPOL ANNEX VI AND/OR
ZONES REGULATED BY REGIONAL AND/OR NATIONAL AUTHORITIES.
CHARTERERS TO ARRANGE LOW SULPHUR IFO/MDO/MGO AT THEIR TIME AND EXPENSES FOR CALLING ANY EMISSION
CONTROL ZONE, SUCH AS BUT NOT LIMITED TO NORTH AMERICAN/EU/CHINESE PORTS AND OTHER RESTRICTED AREAS.
ALL DETAILS ABOUT
Plse ppse / offer firm .
Best regards
